entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with small land holdings, typically smaller than two hectares in sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of economic hardship defined as living on less than $1.90 per person per day

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing farm productivity through technologies and management practices

entities.name: FARM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output generated from a farm

entities.name: MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: The techniques and systems used to manage agricultural production

entities.name: MODERN CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Improved seed varieties designed to increase yield and value

entities.name: INPUTS
entities.description: Agricultural resources such as seeds and fertilizers used in production

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the smallholder farms are located

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial gain generated per hectare per year

entities.name: IMPROVED AGRICULTURAL METHODS
entities.description: A set of practices including better crop varieties, animal breeds, and efficient fertilizer use

entities.name: ANIMAL BREEDS
entities.description: Improved livestock varieties used to increase farm value

entities.name: FERTILISERS
entities.description: Substances added to soil to increase nutrient content and crop yield

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause losses to agricultural production

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that cause losses to crops and livestock

entities.name: INCOME PER CAPITA
entities.description: The average income earned per person in a household
